examples: The place is quirky, funky and dazzlingly imaginative in design.
She would love to buy her daughter funky little leopard-print skirts.
Inside their home, the mood was all about entertainment—sleek furnishings and a funky cocktail bar.
Another newcomer fast gaining a stellar reputation is the funky, retro-styled Gilt Lounge.
Above ground, the fabulously funky Q Brothers will perform their hip hop-rap act Othello: The Remix.
